agent: Instructions Generator
---

take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it int the/docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that , otherwise generate an appropriate  filename based on the  generated content. Make sure that the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file.
